parameters.query:
SELECT TOP 1
    e.email_id,
    e.sender_email,
    e.subject,
    e.body,
    s.sentiment_label,
    s.sentiment_score,
    s.anger_score,
    s.urgency_score
FROM emails e
INNER JOIN sentiment_analysis s ON e.email_id = s.email_id
WHERE e.processing_status = 'processed'
ORDER BY e.email_id DESC;

INSERT INTO risk_analysis (
    email_id,
    risk_level,
    risk_score,
    detected_risk_factors,
    recommended_action
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.email_id}},
    '{{$json.risk_level}}',
    {{$json.risk_score}},
    '{{$json.detected_risk_factors}}',
    '{{$json.recommended_action}}'
);

INSERT INTO workflow_logs (
    workflow_name,
    email_id,
    execution_status,
    log_message
)
VALUES (
    '03 - Risk Detection',
    {{$json.email_id}},
    'success',
    'Risk analysis completed and saved by n8n workflow.'
);
